docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY MORAN, ANDREA AS TO DEFENDANT SAYERDRA, KUMAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORAN, ANDREA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-19-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---ELLEN ROSENTHAL. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED OCT-08-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAYERDRA, KUMAR
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORAN, ANDREA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAYERDRA, KUMAR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
